---
title: "Research"
---

## Optical Computing

![](images/Optical%20Computing.jpg){.research-image fig-alt="Optical computing research image"}

Description forthcoming.

## Disordered Photonics

![](images/Disordered%20Photonics.jpg){.research-image fig-alt="Disordered photonics research image"}

Description forthcoming.

## Topological Photonics

Description forthcoming.

## Open Quantum Systems

Description forthcoming.
